parts.text: Hello! What can you help me with?
Add a task to practice LeetCode dynamic programming problems tomorrow at 10am for 90 minutes. Make it high priority under the DSA category.
Show me all my pending tasks.
I want to get a software engineering job offer by December 31st this year. Create a goal for that.
What does my schedule look like for this week?
I have 2 hours free right now. What should I work on? Recommend the most important tasks.
Create a daily habit for me: 30 minutes of morning workout every day at 7am. Link it to my Fitness category.
What is my productivity score for this week? Give me a detailed breakdown.
Do I have any scheduling conflicts in my tasks? If yes, suggest how to fix them.
Give me my daily productivity review and coaching recommendations for today.
Remember this for me: I do my best deep work between 9am and 12pm. I should not schedule meetings during that time.
